overview: Professional personal website for Vwede, a no-code developer specializing in Caffeine AI. Showcases his services — websites, apps, web apps, and business solutions — with a portfolio section, about section, and a contact form for visitors to reach him directly.
features: Hero section introducing Vwede as a Caffeine AI developer
About section with background and expertise
Services section with specific categories: websites, apps, web apps, e-commerce, business automation
Contact page with form saving messages to backend and prominent email display
Professional top navigation bar with mobile responsive menu
